summary: NeuroBoost app - a memory/brain training app. User wants all instances of 'Memory Increase' text inside the app replaced with 'NeuroBoost'.

existing_features.title: Find and replace all occurrences of the text 'Memory Increase' (and any case variants like 'memory increase', 'Memory increase') with 'NeuroBoost' across all frontend source files, including page components, layout components, home page hero sections, game cards, headings, labels, button text, and any other visible UI text.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace all 'Memory Increase' text inside the app with 'NeuroBoost'
